tabs.tab_title: What is a sales funnel, and how does your product help me manage it?
tabs.accordion_content: A sales funnel is a visual representation of the customer journey, from initial awareness to purchase. Our product provides a centralized platform to track and manage leads at each stage of the funnel. You can visualize the progress of leads, identify bottlenecks, and optimize your sales process for maximum efficiency.

tabs.tab_title: How does your lead scoring feature work?
tabs.accordion_content: A sales funnel is a visual representation of the customer journey, from initial awareness to purchase. Our product provides a centralized platform to track and manage leads at each stage of the funnel. You can visualize the progress of leads, identify bottlenecks, and optimize your sales process for maximum efficiency.

tabs.tab_title: Can I customize the stages of my sales funnel?
tabs.accordion_content: Tell Desk offers a flexible subscription model. You can choose between monthly or annual billing, with different plans tailored for startups, growing businesses, and enterprises. Custom pricing is also available for larger teams.

tabs.tab_title: How does your product integrate with other tools I use?
tabs.accordion_content: Yes! Multiple users can collaborate in real-time, track progress, and assign tasks. You’ll always have visibility into who is working on what, without messy back-and-forth emails.

tabs.tab_title: What kind of support is available?
tabs.accordion_content: We offer 24/7 email support, live chat during business hours, and a knowledge base with step-by-step guides. Premium plans include dedicated account managers.
